moving on,

Who are y'alls favorite YouTubers? I watch like two genres of YouTube and that's gaming and commentary YouTubers

The amount of Danny Gonzalez, Drew Gooden, and Kubz Scouts I've watched is actually worrying. I fall asleep to their videos sometimes cause I need noise (specifically people talking) to sleep. Idk why, it's odd and I don't understand why I can't sleep in calm silence 😭😭😭

Also I've realized that I've totally neglected my announcements doc, I'm gonna try to use it again but I am so damn forgetful, I'm sorry y'all 💔
